title: Isolation Creation XI: Travel Souvenirs
author: awalsh
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Creativity Challenge during the Covid-19 pandemic: 3D museum of random items found around the house. This (modern reconstruction) Phoenician glass vessel was gifted to me in 2018 by a coworker when we were both working as archaeological illustrators in Israel. I sometimes use it to practice drawing, while I wait for the time when we can get back in the field, see more beautiful places, and study their material culture. Source: Objaverse 1.0 / Sketchfab
